runs.explanation: The calculation on line 34 can cause over-allocation by applying a minimum to each recipient independently, which can make the sum of planned allocations exceed the total. Additionally, line 72 uses simple integer truncation, which leads to under-allocation by discarding fractional remainders, so the entire total is not distributed.
